content.body: Is there a better client for Matrix than Element? I just discovered I missed updates to threads going back for years. And when you click on the Threads icon it doesn't even give you a way to view all unread threads. You have to keep scrolling back in time letting it load all the things, which I'm not going to do so I just marked it all as read and hope to keep better track of it going forward.

There are no better clients I'm aware of. IMHO at this point we'd be better off migrating to Discord. Whatever other problems Discord has, it at least seems to but have the serious UX deficiencies that Element has.
One UX deficiency that Discord has is having phantom unread message badges on a bunch of channels all the time cause some Bitcoin scammer came through and had to be banned.

When we started out with Matrix, it seemed to have some promise, and there was some hope that its ecosystem would improve. But it's been years now, and IMHO it's really not improved. So I feel like it's time to give up on it, and cut our losses.
Yeah it's not perfect. It's just better that Matrix at least

* There are no better clients I'm aware of. IMHO at this point we'd be better off migrating to Discord. Whatever other problems Discord has, it at least seems to not have the serious UX deficiencies that Element has.

m.new_content.body: There are no better clients I'm aware of. IMHO at this point we'd be better off migrating to Discord. Whatever other problems Discord has, it at least seems to not have the serious UX deficiencies that Element has.

content.body: I guess if you're already using Discord that would be nice, but I'm not and I really don't want another thing.
